channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: siddharthvaddem / openscreen
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 15,745 → 16,716 (+971) | Ranked #1
Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.
Language: TypeScript 2,573 stars today

item.title: Yeachan-Heo / oh-my-codex
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 11,572 → 12,551 (+979) | Ranked #2
OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.
Language: TypeScript 2,867 stars today

item.title: asgeirtj / system_prompts_leaks
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 36,288 → 36,773 (+485) | Ranked #3
Extracted system prompts from ChatGPT (GPT-5.4, GPT-5.3, Codex), Claude (Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, Claude Code), Gemini (3.1 Pro, 3 Flash, CLI), Grok (4.2, 4), Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. 306 stars today

item.title: sherlock-project / sherlock
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 77,216 → 77,670 (+454) | Ranked #4
Hunt down social media accounts by username across social networks
Language: Python 827 stars today
